backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of the GasRefillPanel 'Previously on/Latest on' layout update with high confidence, linked to test ID REQ-19.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key behaviors.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Working Days Counter Application' that mounts the React app via a root div and module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders a dashboard grid with WeatherPanel, PrayerTimesPanel, a countdown card showing days to 30th May (excluding Sundays), GasRefillPanel, and MilkDeliveryPanel.
frontend/src/components/GasRefillPanel.t: Static card component displaying cooking gas change and refill delivery dates split into 'Previously on' and 'Latest on' sub-sections using shadcn UI primitives.
frontend/src/components/MilkDeliveryPane: Form card component for logging milk delivery records to Supabase and downloading all records as a CSV file using only browser-native APIs.
frontend/src/components/PrayerTimesPanel: Component that fetches and displays the five daily Islamic prayer times for Rajakilpakkam from the Aladhan API in 12-hour format, refreshing daily at midnight.
frontend/src/components/WeatherPanel.tsx: React component that fetches and displays current temperature and rain probability for Rajakilpakkam using the Open-Meteo API, refreshing every hour.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty placeholder file indicating no backend queries are needed since all calculations are done client-side.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining a dark brown OKLCH color theme with CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/supabase.ts: Supabase client utility providing functions to insert and fetch milk delivery records from the MilkDB table via direct REST API calls.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based color tokens, custom border radii, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the dashboard app's project state (version 27), summarizing all panels (Gas Refill, Prayer Times, Weather, Working Days, Milk Delivery), architectural notes for Supabase integration, known issues (broken Supabase API key/network errors), and a list of existing implemented features.
